dare-to-make-this-raw-kibbe-comedera.name: Dare To Make This Raw Kibbe
dare-to-make-this-raw-kibbe-comedera.original_name: Anímate a hacer este kibbe crudo

ingredients.item: 1 cda of ground pimenton or paprika

instructions: Take his back and add all his condiments with his lemon juice. With the help of a spoonful mix everything very well, cover with film paper and lead to the refrigerator for 2 hours.
Take the wheat and hydrate it for 1 hour in enough water. After this time, put down his wheat and get him to cook with high heat for 30 minutes. Once cooked, scrape them and reserve them.

Once the meat's cooling time's up, you'll get it out of the refrigerator and add burgol wheat, onion minced into notebooks, fresh mint and crumbling nuts. It's a good mix so that it's fully integrated.

To place, I like to do it as a big meatball. We give him the form and we'll put him onto a deep plate. We can make them symmetric forms on the surface with a knife and decorate with parsley or cilantro.

dark-poisoned-chocolate-apples-super-com.name: Dark "poisoned" Chocolate Apples: Super
dark-poisoned-chocolate-apples-super-com.original_name: Tenebrosas manzanas de chocolate "envenenadas": súper fácil

ingredients.item: 2  manzanas rojas (tipo royal gala o fuji, bien firmes)
1 cdita de mantequilla o aceite de coco
1 cdite of vanilla essence or orange liquor (optional for an adult)
2  palitos de madera o brochetas gruesas
Decoration to taste: black sparks, violet sugar, pieces of crisped oatmeal, mini mallebars or melted red caramel
1 drop of black or edible purple dye (mixed with chocolate to give a darker tone)

instructions: Lava y seca muy bien las manzanas. Retira el tallo y clava los palitos de madera en el centro, asegurando que queden firmes.
In a heat-resistant container, melt chocolate with butter or coconut oil into a tidal or microwave bath (at intervals of 20 seconds).
Add pint of salt and vanilla. If you have an "poisoned" effect, add an edible dyes and mix up until the chocolate is smooth and bright.
Cover a plate with waxed paper or a Silicone plate.
Summerize every apple into hot chocolate and turn it to cover completely.
Before chocolate tightens, decorates with sparks, cookie pieces or colorful sugar.
Let the apples stand at room temperature or refrigerate them for 15- 20 minutes until the chocolate is firm.
Serves on a decorative base or wrap them up with clear paper if you wish to give them away.

decadent-chocolate-chip-bar-cookies.name: Decadent Chocolate Chip Bar Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat butter in a large bowl using an electric mixer until smooth. Add brown sugar and white sugar; mix until well blended. Add egg and vanilla extract and beat until smooth.

Toss 2 cups plus 2 tablespoon flour, baking soda, and salt together using a fork in a small bowl. Add to the butter mixture in batches, mixing well after each addition. Fold in 1 3/4 cups chocolate chips. Spread batter into an ungreased 9x13-inch baking pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden, about 25 minutes. Spread remaining 3/4 cup chocolate chips on top. Return to the oven until chocolate chips are shiny, about 1 minute more. Remove from oven and spread melted chocolate over the top.

deep-fried-oreos.name: Deep-fried Oreos
instructions: Whisk milk, egg, and 2 teaspoons of vegetable oil in a large bowl until smooth.
Stir in the pancake mix until no dry lumps remain.
Dip cookies into batter, one at a time, and carefully place into hot oil.
Fry in batches, 4 or 5 at a time, until cookies are golden brown, about 2 minutes.
Drain on a paper towel-lined plate before serving. Enjoy!

delicious-chocolate-cake-economical-reci.name: Delicious Chocolate Cake - Economical Recipe
delicious-chocolate-cake-economical-reci.original_name: Bolo delicioso de chocolate - receita económica

ingredients.item: 200 g de chocolate negro em barra
200 g de chocolate negro em barra

instructions: In a bowl, mix the flour with baking powder and chocolate powder. In a separate bowl, beat the butter softened with sugar until a cream is left, add the yolks, one by one and always beating. Then add the milk and flour mixture and beat well. Beat the clears into castle and gently mix them in the mix

Fill a form with butter and sprinkle it with flour. Lay the prepared and take it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 45 minutes. Check the cooking with a toothpick and remove. Let it cool down a bit, unshape it and let it cool down really well.

Prepare the filling: place the gelatine leaves to fall into cold water for 5 minutes, then drain them and melt them in a sea bath or microwave without letting them boil. Beat cream in whipped cream with powdered sugar, add melted gelatin and wrap well.

Cut a thin slice to 1/3 of the cake (to make the cake), then cut a circle with about 2 cm margin, without cutting to the bottom, and remove the kernel from the cake in order to leave it whole. Fill the circle with the filling, cover again with the slice that cut and lead to cold for a few hours.
Prepare the cover: light a pot with the creams, boil, turn off the fire and add the broken chocolate to pieces. Let it rest for 15 minutes, then stir well until a cream is smooth and let it cool.
Put the cake on top of a grill, water it with the chocolate mixture and let it rest for a while. Serve decorated with raspberries and mint leaves.

delicious-patties-with-salami-and-cheese.name: Delicious Patties With Salami And Cheese
delicious-patties-with-salami-and-cheese.original_name: Μπουρεκάκια νόστιμα με σαλάμι και τυρί

ingredients.item: About 200 grams of flower inflamed by itsself
About 200 grams of flower inflamed by itsself

instructions: In a bowl, add the oil, the lukewarm milk, sugar, salt, vintage and yeast.
Mix until dissolved and make our dough for sauces and cheese.
Shake the flower and add it a little while while, starring with a spoon.
When the dough is collected in a ball,vide it into 12 balls evening, the size of a large walnut.
The dough for the burrets with salami and cheese must be soft, fluffy and quite oily.
We're catching a piece of dough.
Press the dough between our palms to widen.
Add some salami and cheese to each burreki.
We close the union well.
Put the burrets on an oily baking pan with the compact downwards.
When all 12 of them are finished, brush them with milk or egg solution.
Sprinkle with black or anise.
Bake in a preheated oven at 150
You can have them stuffed in the freezer and make them at the last minute. It's fantastic.

delicious-squid-risotto-step-by-step-com.name: Delicious Squid Risotto, Step By Step
delicious-squid-risotto-step-by-step-com.original_name: Delicioso risotto de calamares, paso a paso
instructions: Prepara el caldo y mantenlo caliente en una cacerola a fuego lento.
In a large frying pan, heat up a tablespoon of olive oil and spray the squid rings for about 3-4 minutes till they are tender. Reserve.
In a large saucer, heat up the other tablespoon of olive oil and spray the onion and garlic till they are clear.
Add the rice to the saucefruit with onion and garlic and cook for 2-3 minutes, constantly stirring, until the rice is slightly roasted.
Fold the white wine and cook, stirring, till the liquid has evaporate.

Add a tablespoon of hot broth to the rice and remove till the liquid is absorbed. It repeats this process and adds a tablespoon of broth at a time and moves constantly, until the rice is cooked at the dente and has a creamy texture (about 18-20 minutes).
To the 15 minutes of cooking of the rice, add cramps and mix well.
Once the rice is ready, remove the pan from the fire and add butter, parmesan cheese and lemon juice. Rewind till everything's well integrated. Adjust salt and pepper to taste.
Sirve inmediatamente, decorando con perejil fresco picado.

dinner-salad-with-radicchio-and-roasted-.name: Dinner Salad With Radicchio And Roasted Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Blend cashews, oil, vinegar, red pepper flakes, fish sauce, honey, garlic, and 1/3 cup warm water in a blender until very creamy, smooth, and pourable. Taste dressing and season with salt.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 218°C. Place sweet potatoes on a rimmed baking sheet, drizzle with oil, and season with kosher salt; turn to coat. Arrange cut side down; roast until tender and cut sides are browned, 20–25 minutes. Let cool.
Bring a medium pot of water to a boil. Carefully lower eggs into water and cook 8 minutes. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water and let cool. Remove eggs from ice water, pat dry, and peel.

Toss radicchio, fennel, and vinegar in a large bowl; season with sea salt. Drizzle 1/2 cup dressing down sides of bowl. Using your hands, fold salad, working from the bottom out toward the sides of the bowl, until evenly coated in dressing.

Transfer salad to a platter. Tear sweet potatoes and eggs into 1 1/2" pieces and nestle into salad. Season egg yolks with sea salt. Drizzle more dressing over and top with cashews and cilantro. Serve with remaining dressing alongside.
